task: The rabbit nibbled the carrot from the garden. It had been growing well thanks to the rains.
Iris learned the song from Veronica. She practiced it every afternoon on the upright piano.
The clock chimed midnight in the hall. It was an antique passed down through generations.
Owen recommended a restaurant to Felix. He had dined there several times during business trips.
The artist sketched the model on the page. He worked quickly with bold confident strokes throughout.
Yvonne admired the dress that Theresa wore. She had bought it on a recent vacation abroad.
The cyclist passed the runner near the bridge. He was training for an upcoming race.
Mabel praised Henrietta for her courage. She had spoken up at a difficult board meeting.
The fountain sprayed water across the courtyard. It had been built to celebrate the city anniversary.
